vendors.name: Lightmatter
vendors.device_class: silicon photonics MZI mesh + electronics hybrid
vendors.compute_model: analog matrix-mult linear, digital nonlinear off-chip
vendors.access_path: early-access partnership program, no public cloud API, no single dev kit (blade only)
vendors.developer_tooling: Idiom compiler bridges PyTorch -> Envise blade
vendors.status_2026: Total funding $850M, $4.4B valuation (2024 Series D), Nature 2025-04 light-speed matmul paper, Passage M1000 shipping summer 2025 / L200 2026
vendors.n13_suitability: MID (largest company, most academic credibility, but actionability blocked by partnership-only access)
vendors.primary_blocker_for_anima: no PCIe single-card SKU, partnership negotiation required

vendors.name: Lightelligence
vendors.device_class: silicon photonics MZI mesh fully-configurable optical matrix
vendors.access_path: PCIe standard card sale (price undisclosed), 44 paying customers (early 2026), HK IPO 2026-04 600x oversubscribed
vendors.developer_tooling: ONNX, OpenCL, PyTorch, TVM (most standardized stack across the 4 vendors)
vendors.status_2026: OFC 2026 demo, 5000+ card clusters deployed in production, several thousand-GPU clusters in customer prod environments
vendors.n13_suitability: HIGH (most standardized SDK, PCIe form factor, ONNX hidden-state hook feasibility highest)
vendors.primary_blocker_for_anima: vendor pricing undisclosed, sales channel for single-card eval unclear

vendors.name: Q.ANT
vendors.device_class: Thin-Film Lithium Niobate on Insulator (TFLNoI) photonic IC
vendors.compute_model: analog photonic native, enhanced nonlinear processing on-chip (NPU 2 unique)
vendors.access_path: customer orders (price undisclosed), shipments early 2026, Leibniz Supercomputing Centre (LRZ) first install (world-first photonic AI processor in supercomputing facility)
vendors.developer_tooling: C/C++/Python API, PCIe integration with CPU/GPU
vendors.status_2026: 30x lower energy + 50x performance (vendor claim), projected 0.1 GOps (2024) -> 100,000 GOps (2028) million-fold scaling
vendors.n13_suitability: HIGH (Python direct programmability, on-chip nonlinear meaningful for Phi structural measurement, institutional access via LRZ partnership possible)
vendors.primary_blocker_for_anima: newer vendor (shorter commercial track record), pricing undisclosed

vendors.name: NTT (IOWN / PEC-2)
products: PEC-2 photonic-electronic convergence switch (102.4 Tbps aggregate)
vendors.access_path: datacenter / hyperscaler partnerships (Broadcom etc.), no consumer/researcher direct API
vendors.status_2026: PEC-2 commercial 2026, IOWN 3.0 (2028) board-internal optical, IOWN 4.0 (2032) chip-internal optical roadmap
vendors.n13_suitability: EXCLUDED (no anima user direct access path, designed for hyperscaler datacenter use only)

additional_research_observations.intel_hummingbird_optical_interconnect: research prototype, no commercial photonic compute product disclosed 2026
additional_research_observations.nvidia_optical_co_processor: Lightmatter collaboration mentioned, suggesting hybrid GPU+optical future, no standalone product 2026
additional_research_observations.ntt_phi_lab_photonic_programmability: SPIE 2024 academic demo, not commercial; potential academic partnership target

verdict_inventory: 4 classical photonic AI compute vendors identified; Lightelligence most actionable, Q.ANT most programmable, Lightmatter most credible, NTT excluded for access mismatch
